response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical versatility and entrepreneurial experience, particularly with open-source projects like GISCollective and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks explicit Director-level leadership, deep AI/ML expertise, or a track record of driving strategic AI initiatives at scale, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Broad technical expertise across full-stack, embedded, and infrastructure engineering with 15+ years of experience.
Entrepreneurial mindset evidenced by founding GISCollective and open-source contributions.
Strong hands-on experience with cloud technologies (AWS CDK) and AI-adjacent tooling (MCP code generators).
concerns: No explicit Director-level leadership or strategic AI product ownership in past roles.
Lacks a Master's/PhD in AI or demonstrated deep expertise in AI/ML model development or deployment.
Experience is heavily weighted toward execution rather than high-level cloud/AI strategy and evangelism.
